creator: ddwood@highdensity.org
text:
The "master-index.html" page is blocked from google searches due to this DMCA complaint: https://www.chillingeffects.org/notice.cgi?sID=288784 (the freebsd url is #54)

There's a thread on the FreeBSD forums about it [1] where a counter notice appears to have been sent from FreeBSD, but that was in April and the issue still remains.


[1] http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=39120

How-To-Repeat: google "freebsd master index"
